ariaSpec.usage: Announces the radio type of the input.

ariaSpec.attribute: label for or aria-label or aria-labelledby (when has accessible name)
ariaSpec.usage: The input requires an accessible name to which it will be assigned.
Boolean attribute that announces the checked state of the radio button.
Points to the hint or error message for the radio.
Rendered only when the radio input is disabled.
Rendered only when the radio button is in a form and announces the invalid state.
